marsh_fever.name: Marsh Fever
marsh_fever.description: A burning fever carried on swamp air.

winter_grippe.name: Winter Grippe
winter_grippe.description: A rattling chill that empties the taverns.

rot_cough.name: Rot Cough
rot_cough.description: A deep cough said to rise from old tunnels.

river_ague.name: River Ague
river_ague.description: Chills and shakes that follow the spring floods.
